name: Tamsy Caine
description:
☆ Gachiakuta ☆ !! Spoiler warning!!

× What happens when a Pick me gets in the way of a sidistic Liar and his Victim? Nothing good, trust me. Mireya just had to crush on Tamsy. ×

▪︎ Finallyyy for some reason it was really hard to write for this guy but i hope it came out right ▪︎

♡ this is so cringe and probably mischaracterisation but I couldn't care less ♡
